description: Node.js app that calls _.template() from lodash — the vulnerable function for CVE-2021-23337 (prototype pollution via template). Tree-sitter call-graph analysis confirms the vulnerable symbol is reachable from the express route handler.

findings.human_justification: _.template() is called in the /render route handler in app.js. Tree-sitter confirms the vulnerable lodash function is reachable from the application entry point.
